allow: PowerShell(Get-Process node, java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, @{N='StartTime';E={$_.StartTime}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($ports = @\(3306, 5000, 8081\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $r = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port $p -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port $p : $\(if \($r\) {'OPEN'} else {'CLOSED'}\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='Cmd';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($r = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 5000 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port 5000 : $\(if \($r\) {'OPEN'} else {'CLOSED'}\)"; if \($r\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "HTTP: $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "HTTP err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "OK status=$\($resp.StatusCode\) body=$\($resp.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$resp.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } ; netstat -ano | findstr ":5000")

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Listening ports for any node process ==="; netstat -ano | findstr "LISTENING" | findstr ":5000\\|:8081"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== All node-related listeners ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName -eq 'node' } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table)
